purpose: MSBuild project file: configures .NET 10 WinForms app targeting Windows, embeds and copies Matrix.ico and web/ assets, references WebView2 NuGet package, and strips the unwanted WebView2 WPF assembly reference.
invariants: Matrix.ico is both an EmbeddedResource (for runtime icon loading) and a Content file (copied to output)
web/ assets are Content with CopyToOutputDirectory=PreserveNewest; large/dev-only subdirs excluded
gotchas: The _MatrixDesktop_RemoveWebView2WpfReference target removes Microsoft.Web.WebView2.Wpf from references to prevent MSB3277 WindowsBase version conflict
web/playdate, web/msdfgen, web/svg sources, screenshots, and source-only files are excluded from publish output to reduce artifact size
